title: The Long Haul: Vanilla Refined
description: A vanilla-plus modpack that extends Minecraft's progression from start to finish, rewarding patience and thoughtful gameplay over rushing to the end.
body:
![THE LONG HAUL: VANILLA REFINED BANNER](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/635d96e43ddf2fa216bd053b196968dae1298ca8.png) The Long Haul is a comprehensive vanilla-plus modpack that transforms Minecraft into an extended journey where every moment matters. Built for players who want to savor their gameplay rather than rush through it, this pack carefully balances progression, exploration, and creativity to create a deeply rewarding experience. Say goodbye to completing Minecraft in a weekend. With thoughtfully slowed progression through skill-based systems and hundreds of new discoveries waiting around every corner, you'll find yourself naturally building sprawling bases, mastering each gameplay tier, and truly living in the worlds you create. Enhanced world generation, quality of life improvements, and visual upgrades make the extended journey enjoyable rather than tedious. ## What does this modpack offer? • 📈 **Progression System** — Advance through skill tiers with [LevelZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/levelz) and its expansions ([LevelZ Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/levelz-additions), [ElementZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/elementz), [Even more LevelZ support](https://modrinth.com/mod/even-more-levelz-support))! • 🌍 **World Generation Overhaul** — Explore 70+ unique biomes from [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith), discover reimagined caves with [Better Lush Caves](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-lush-caves), and brave transformed dimensions! • 🏰 **Endless Structures** — Discover hundreds of custom additions from [Yung's Better Structures](https://modrinth.com/user/YUNGNICKYOUNG), [Repurposed Structures](https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-fabric), [Structory](https://modrinth.com/mod/structory), [Structory: Towers](https://modrinth.com/mod/structory-towers), and various exploration-focused structure mods! • 🧱 **Building Paradise** — Create with over 10,000 decorative blocks from [Chipped](https://modrinth.com/mod/chipped), [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries), [Handcrafted](https://modrinth.com/mod/handcrafted), [Decorative Blocks](https://modrinth.com/mod/decorative-blocks), [Ytones](https://modrinth.com/mod/ytones), [Stoneworks](https://modrinth.com/mod/stoneworks), and countless other building and decoration mods! • 🎨 **Immersive Visuals** — Experience [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations), [improved foliage](https://modrinth.com/mod/separatedleaves), 3D models, and shader support with [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris), [BSL](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders), [Complementary](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined), and [Bliss](https://modrinth.com/shader/bliss-shader)! • 🍳 **Culinary System** — Prepare elaborate meals with the complete [Let's Do](https://modrinth.com/mod/do-api) collection ([Farm & Charm](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-farm-charm), [Meadow](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-meadow), [HerbalBrews](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-herbalbrews), [Corn Expansion](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-addon-corn-expansion)) and [Sushi Bar](https://modrinth.com/mod/sushi-bar)! • 💎 **Digital Storage Network** — Organize massive collections with [Applied Energistics 2's](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2) autocrafting, enhanced with [MEGA Cells](https://modrinth.com/mod/mega), [Wireless Terminals](https://modrinth.com/mod/applied-energistics-2-wireless-terminals), and [Polymorphic Energistics](https://modrinth.com/mod/polymorphic-energistics)! • 🎒 **Extended Inventory** — Carry everything you need with [Inmis backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/inmis), [trinket slots](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets), and [Accessories](https://modrinth.com/mod/accessories)! • 🐾 **Wildlife Expansion** — Encounter 30+ new creatures with [Friends & Foes](https://modrinth.com/mod/friends-and-foes), [Critters & Companions](https://modrinth.com/mod/critters-and-companions), [Enderman Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/enderman-overhaul), [Creeper Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/creeper-overhaul), and other creature mods! • 🔥 **Nether Transformation** — Brave dangerous bosses and biomes from [Incendium](https://modrinth.com/mod/incendium) and [Nether Depths Upgrade](https://modrinth.com/mod/nether-depths-upgrade)! • 🏔️ **End Dimension Revamp** — Experience redesigned islands with [Nullscape](https://modrinth.com/mod/nullscape) terrain and [Yung's Better End Island](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-end-island)! • 🔧 **Convenience Features** — Access [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) and [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi) recipes, navigate with [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) and [Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap), and fast travel with [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones)! • ⚡ **Performance Optimized** — Enjoy smooth gameplay with [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium), [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium), [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core), [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix), and [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast)! ## **Important Information:** This modpack is built for players who want a longer, more deliberate Minecraft experience. Expect to spend significantly more time progressing than in vanilla Minecraft, this is intentional and core to the experience. With 350+ carefully curated mods , performance optimizations ensure smooth gameplay despite the added content.

Experiencing any bugs or crashes, or want to share your ideas? Feel free to reach out by joining our Discord server or submitting an issue on GitHub
